description: Combined mass, buoyancy, and hydrodynamic drag for a human body on a position-based translational port. Weight, Archi...
searchText: diver body simscapeblock scuba_lib uncategorized diver body combined mass, buoyancy, and hydrodynamic drag for a human body on a position-based translational port. weight, archimedes buoyancy, and quadratic drag are all applied as body forces through the port.

searchText: bcd bladder simscapeblock scuba_lib uncategorized bcd bladder flexible variable-volume accumulator with buoyancy force output. internal pressure equals ambient (flexible walls). volume = n*r*t/p_amb, clamped to v_max. applies buoyancy force through position-based translational port.  gas/elements
